title: Lungleiah hmeichhiate harsatna ngaihthlakna hun, Mahila Jan Sunwai (Public Hearing) buatsaih a ni
content:
4751/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 9:Vawiin khan Mizoram State Commission for Women leh Lunglei District Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Legal Services Authority leh Women & Child Development Department te ṭang kawp huaihawtin Circuit House Conference Hall, Lungleiah hmeichhiate harsatna ngaihthlak leh chin felsakna hun, Mahila Jan Sunwai (Public Hearing) buatsaih a ni.

He hunah hian hmeichhe pariat (8) hnen aṭangin an harsatna thu thlen (complaint) dawn a ni a. A hmunah case 2 chin fel niin, case 6 chu Police leh DLSA-ah dan anga hma lak zui turin thlen chhawn a ni a. Complaint tam zawk hi hmeichhiate chanvo rah behsak leh enkawlna an dawn tur ang an dawn loh chungchang a ni a. Public Hearing-ah hian panel-ah Mizoram State Commission for Women Member Pi Rebeck Lalruatdiki Khiangte, Lunglei District Additional SP Pi Sarah Lalrinkimi, Advocate Pi Lalrindiki Ralte leh Advocate Pi Rashmi Chhetri te an ṭhu a ni.

Public Hearing hi International Women's Day, 2026 lawmna pakhat atan ram pum huapin buatsaih a ni.

Attachment

title: A One-Day Media Workshop "Varta" Conducted at Lunglei
content:
539/2025-2026

Lunglei, 9 March 2026:A one-day media workshop titled "Varta" on Viksit Bharat – Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Act, 2025 and the National AIDS and STD Control Programme was organised today by the Press Information Bureau (PIB), Ministry of Information & Broadcasting, Government of India, at the Press Club, Lunglei.

Pi Navneet Mann, IAS, Deputy Commissioner, Lunglei, attended the programme as Chief Guest. Pu CMS Dawngliana, Vice President, YMA Sub-Headquarters, Lunglei, and Pu F. Lalngaihzuala, Vice President, MJA Lunglei, were the Guests of Honour.

In her address, the Deputy Commissioner highlighted that both schemes are highly relevant for Mizoram, particularly for Lunglei district. She said that the Viksit Bharat Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) (VB-G RAM G), the new version of MGNREGA, guarantees 125 days of employment per rural household and supports rural livelihoods, especially in the agricultural sector. She also emphasised the importance of the National AIDS and Sexually Transmitted Diseases Control Programme, noting that Mizoram records one of the highest numbers of HIV/AIDS cases in the country.

She further stressed the important role of media and social media in spreading awareness and ensuring that accurate information about government schemes reaches the people. She also appreciated the Press Information Bureau for organising the workshop.

Pu CMS Dawngliana thanked the organisers for conducting the workshop and highlighted the importance of creating awareness on employment and health-related programmes. Pu F. Lalngaihzuala also appreciated PIB for organising the workshop and requested that a special press tour be arranged for members of the Mizoram Journalists' Association (MJA), Lunglei.

Dr Rajeev Lourembam, Head of Office, PIB Aizawl, delivered the keynote address. During the technical session, the G RAM G Act, 2025 was presented by officials from DRDO Lunglei. This was followed by a presentation on the National AIDS & STD Control Programme by Dr Zodinpuii Hrahsel, CPM, DISHA. The workshop concluded with an interactive question-and-answer session with participants.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah PIB huaihawtin One-Day Media Workshop "Varta" buatsaih a ni
content:
4750/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 9:Vawiin khan sawrkar laipui Ministry of Information & Broadcasting hnuaia Press Information Bureau (PIB) huaihawtin Lunglei Press Club-ah Viksit Bharat – Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Act, 2025 leh National AIDS and STD Control Programme chungchang zir hona, "One-day media workshop — Varta" buatsaih a ni.

Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan Khuallian niin he hun hi a hmanpui a. Ni za inhlawhna (MGNREGA) thlakna VB-G RAM G hnuaiah ni 125 inhlawhna siam a nih tawh dawn thu sawiin, thingtlang mite tana ei zawnna leh hmasawnna tam tak a thlen tur thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu India rama HIV/AIDS hluarna ber zinga mi a nih avangin National AIDS & STD Control Programme hnuaia hma lakna chu a pawimawh thu leh ṭhahnem ngai taka kalpui a ṭul thu a sawi a. Sawrkar ruahmanna hrang hrangte a chhawrtu tur mipuite'n an hriat theih nan media-te'n mawhphurhna pawimawh tak an nei tih sawiin, media mite chu inzir belh zel turin a chah a, media mite intuai thar nana PIB-in media workshop a buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Lunglei Sub-Headquarters YMA Vice President Pu CMS Dawngliana leh Mizoram Journalists' Association (Lunglei) District Vice President Pu F. Lalngaihzuala te chu Khual Zahawm an ni a. Pu CMS Dawngliana chuan scheme pawimawh tak tak puanzar leh inzirtir chu pawimawh a tih thu sawiin, YMA hma laknaa inzirtirna hrang hrang kalpui a nih ṭhin dan te a tar lang a. Pu F. Lalngaihzuala pawhin PIB-in media workshop an buatsaih chu hlu a tih thu sawiin, MJA Lunglei District tan press tour buatsaih turin a ngen.

PIB Aizawla Head of Office Dr Rajeev Lourembam chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, hun hman chhan a sawi fiah a. DRDO Lunglei ai awhte'n G RAM G Act, 2025 chungchang zirtirin, DISHA CPM Dr Zodinpuii Hrahsel chuan National AIDS & STD Control Programme chungchang a zirtir a. Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: NEC-IN MIZORAM TAN ₹5.73 CRORE A SEM CHHUAK
content:
4749/2025-2026

Aizawl, 9th March 2026:North Eastern Council (NEC) chuan February 2026 chhung khan Hmarchhak bial puma hmasawnna hna hrang hrang thawh nan ₹67,41,09,587/- a sem chhuak a. He sum sem chhuah zingah hian Mizoram chuan ₹5,73,69,245/- a dawng a ni.

Mizoram-a Project Pawimawh Thlante:

• West Phaileng Market Building: Mamit District-a thlai thar zawrhna hmun (Market Building) sakna tur.• Potato Seed Farm: Tissue Culture leh ARC thiamna hmanga Alu chi tha siam chhuahna tur.• Central Medical Warehouse, Aizawl: Damdawi leh inenkawlna hmanrua vawn thatna leh sem darhna hmunpui dinna tur.• State Veterinary Information and Resource Centre: Ran vulhtute tana thiamna leh hriatna thar inhrilh hriatna hmun dinna tur.

He hmalakna hian Mizoram chhunga eizawnna, hriselna leh lo neihna kawngah hmasawnna lian tak a thlen beisei a ni.

NEC Feb- Press Note Mizoram.pdf

title: MINISTER PU F RODINGLIANA'N CHAPCHAR KUT EXHIBITION HAWNG
content:
4748/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 9th March 2026:Vawiin khan Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department Minister Pu F Rodingliana’n Chapchar Kut 2026 lawmna puala buatsaih ‘Handloom, Textiles, Handicrafts Exhibition, Food Processing & Food Court’ Lammual Tlang-a buahsaih a hawng.

Chief Minister Chairman-na hnuaia din Chapchar Kut, 2026 Organizing Committee rawtna angin Kum 2026, Chapchar Kut lawmna atan Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department chuan he exhibition hi a buatsaih a, ni nga chhung (March 9-13) chhung awh tur niin he exhibition-ah hian a hnuai ami ang hian stall hawn a ni.

1. Handloom & Textiles- 68 stalls2. Handicrafts - 15 stalls3. Food Processing - 12 stalls4. Food Court - 35 stalls

Heng bakah hian PM Viswakarma scheme hnuaia thil siam chhuah pho nan stall-1 leh Shakti Sadan tan stall-1 a awm bawk.

Handloom Exhibition bik atan hian Development Commissioner (Handloom), Ministry of Textiles, Govt. of India atangin Handloom Marketing Assistance hnuaiah sum hmuh niin, Food Processing-ho tan erawh MFME hnuaiah stall sak sak an ni.

Nikum 2025 Chapachar Kut Handloom Exhibition-ah khan ₹128.00 lakh lai hralh chhuah a ni a, kumin-ah hian hmun hma ten a zir bawk a, hei aia tam hi hralh chhuah ngei an beisei a ni.

Attachment

title: THINGDAWLAH INTERNATIONAL WOMEN'S DAY 2026 HMAN A NI
content:
4747/2025-2026

Kolasib, the 9th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan NABARD Kolasib District bultumin PMKSY Hall, Thingdawlah International Women's Day hman a ni a. He hun hi Thingdawl RD Block BDO, Dr. Doris Lalrinawmi chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Kumin International Women's Day pual hian United Nations (UN) chuan thupuiah "Give to Gain" tih a thlang a. Vawiin hun hmanna hi Pu J.D. Traite, DDM NABARD, Kolasib chuan kaihruaiin, hmeichhiate tana NABARD hmalaknate leh sawrkar laipuiin hmeichhiate hamthatna tura a duan scheme hrang hrang – Lakhpati Didis leh Namo Drone Didi Scheme bakah hamthatna awm thei hrang hrangte tarlan leh sawifiah a ni.

Khuallian Dr. Doris Lalrinawmi chuan thu sawiin, khawvel puma hmeichhiaten ni bik kan nei hran hi hmeichhiate pawimawhna lantirtu a ni, a ti a. Sawrkarin hmeichhiate hamthatna tur hrang hrang a siam thu sawiin, a bik takin Mizo hmeichhiate chu thenawm ramte nena khaikhinin dinhmun tha taka ding kan nih avangin, kan dinhmun thatnate hi a tha zawnga hmang thiam theuh turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

Hmeichhiate chu chhungkuaa fate enkawltu leh thuchhia-tha hrilh thei bertu an nih thu sawiin, Khuallian chuan, "Kan thawhthat chuan chhungkua mai bakah khawtlang leh ram thlengin a nghawng thei a ni," a ti a. Hmeichhiate chu tawngkam hmanah fimkhur a ngaih thu leh chapo anga lan a awl theih avangin, mahni pawimawhzia hriaa mahni nun theuhah fimkhur turin a chah bawk.

He hunah hian Pi Z.D. Lalramdintluangi, Block Mission Manager (BMM) pawhin thu sawiin, sawrkar atanga MzSRLM, RSETI leh DDU-GKY hnuaia training awm thei apangte chu chhawr tangkai thiam turin mipui a fuih a. Pu Thuamzamung Tunglut, Lead District Manager (LDM) Kolasib leh Pu Lalnunpuia, Branch Manager, MRB Thingdawl Branch ten thu an sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiin International Women's Day pual hun hmannaah hian Thingdawl leh a chhehvel atangin Self Help Group (SHG) member-te leh hmeichhe loneitu (Women Farmers) thahnem tak an tel a. SHG member thenkhatten SHG atanga an hlawhtlinnate sawiin, lawmawm an tih thu an tarlang bawk a ni.

title: Raltlante ei tur buhfai sem dawn
content:
4745/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 9th March, 2026:Serchhip District chhunga raltlan (displaced persons) te hnena buhfai sem dan tur vawiin khan Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma hoin a pisaah thuneituten an rel.

Myanmar, Bangladesh leh Manipur State atanga raltlan Serchhip District chhunga chengte chhawmdawl nan Mizoram Sawrkar chuan a thlawnin buhfai mi pakhat tan kg 35 zelin a sem dawn a. Raltlan mi 995 te tan buhfai a thlawna sem tur hi ruahman a ni.

Meeting chuan Serchhip Sub Headquarters YMA te chu Branch YMA te kaltlanga sem turin a ngen a. Buhfai hi a lo thlen veleh mahni Branch YMA ten mahni venga raltlante tan an sem dawn a ni.

Vawiin meeting ah hian Serchhip DCSO, DLAO, Serchhip Sub Headquarters YMA hotute leh District thuneitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MINISTER PU LALTHANSANGA’N CHAPCHAR KUT PUALA A HUHOVA TLAN ‘CHAPCHAR KUT RUN’ A HMANPUI
content:
4744/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 9th March 2026 :Tukin zing dar 6 khan Central YMA leh Art & Culture Department tangkawp buatsaih Chapchar Kut puala a huhova tlan ‘Chapchar Kut Run’ neih a ni a. Aizawl khawpui chhung hmun hnih - Sikulpuikawn leh Chanmari atanga tlan tanin, Lammual panin a huhova tlan a ni a. Lammual-ah zing dar 7-ah intawhkhawmna hun neih niin, Minister Pu Lalthansanga chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Pu TC Lalkhuma, Joint Secretary, Art & Culture Department chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Minister Pu Lalthansanga chuan Chapchar Kut Run-a kalkhawmte chu chibai bukin, Chapchar Kut chu Mizo pi leh pute hun atanga hun pawimawh tak, zo nun ze mawi chhawmnunna leh inpumkhatna atana an lo hman thin a nih thu a sawi a. Mizo pi leh pute’n tlawmngaihna, inunauna leh rethei leh chhumchhia zawkte dawmkanna nun an lo neih thin chu thangtharte’n kan thiamna leh finna nena kan chawikan deuh deuh a tul thu a sawi a.

Minister chuan kumin Chapchar Kut lo awm turah hian hriselna chawi lar a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Taksa hrisel chuan rilru hrisel a siam a, chu rilru hrisel chu kumin Chapchar Kut thupui ‘Zo nun ze mawi – inremna’ hi aia upa zahna leh inpumkhatnate nen pawh a in rem hle a ni, a ti a. Tukina Chapchar Kut puala tlanhona (Chapchar Kut Run) neih chu a hlawkthlakin, Chapchar Kut tihlutu a nih thu a sawi a. Kalkhawmte chu Mizo hnam zia ropui tak chawisang zel turin a chah a ni.

Tukina Chapchar Kut Run-ah hian Aizawl City Branch YMA tin atangin member engemaw zat an thawk chhuak a. Pu M.S. Ralte, Fin. Secretary, CYMA chuan Sikulpuikawn atanga tlante a vailiam a, Pu SF David Ngursangzuala, Asst. Gen. Secretary, CYMA chuan Chanmari atanga tlante a vailiam bawk a. Lammuala intawhkhawmna hun neihah Pu F. Lalthanmawia, Joint Director, Art & Culture Department chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial DWSM chuan Kar Hnih Awh Tui Kut - Jal Mahotsav hawng
content:
4743/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 9th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Meeting Hall-ah Er. Lalhmangaihzuala, PHED SDO, Hnahthial WATSAN Sub-Division kaihhruaiin Kar hnih awh tur Tui Kut – Jal Mahotsav hawnna hun hman a ni a. Hnahthial District Bawrhsap leh District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) Chairman ni bawk, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan khuallian niin he Kut hi a hawng a ni.

Khuallian chuan Hnahthial chu Mizoram District zawng zawng zingah tui hnianghnarna ber pawl a nih thu sawiin PHED hotute leh thawktute thawhrimna zar a nih thu leh fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Jal Mahotsav thil tum ber chu tui hna humhalh leh enkawl kawnga mipuite zirtirna tha pek a, mipuite rilruah an tui tlan te ta neihna thinlung tuh a nih thu a sawi a. Tui hna kan tihchereu nasat thin avanga tui lama harsatna tam tak kan tawh thin chu pawi a tih thu sawiin zirtirna tha lehzuala kalpui a pawimawhzia tarlangtu a nih thu DSWM member kalkhawmte chu a hrilh a ni.

Jal Jeevan Mission chungchang sawi chhunzawmin Hnahthial chu District-ah hma la tha ber pawl an nih thu leh funding duh anga hmuh a nih thin loh avanga hmalakna khaihlak thin a nih thu a sawi a. DSWM member zawng zawngte chu tui lama Hnahthial khaw hrang hrangte harsatna chu lo ngaihven thin tura chahin thawhhonna tha tak nei zel a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Er. Lalhruaitluanga, Sr.EE, PHED, Hnahthial WATSAN Division, Hnahthial chuan Jal Mahotsav chungchang sawi zauna neiin hman a nih chhan mai bakah JJM hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrangte a tarlang a. Tun dinhmunah chuan Hnahthial District-ah tui connection nei 5341 an awm thu tarlangin khawtlang miten an khua a tui lut chu neitu rilru tak tak an put theih nan an khaw chhunga tui lut senso zawng zawnga atanga za a panga (5%) chu an theih dan danin an tum ve thin thu a tarlang a. Hemi pual hian khawtlang hnenah inhlanchhawnna hun- Jal Arpan Diwas pawh South Vanlaiphai-ah leh Rawpuiah an lo neih tawh thu tarlangin khaw hrang hrangah neih tura ruahmanna siam a nih thu a tarlang bawk.

Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada chu March ni 8 atanga ni 22 chhung neih tura ruahmanna siam a nih thu sawiin hemi pual hian March ni 11 hian New Delhi-ah Category hrang hrang hmingin lawmman semna neih a nih tur thu a tarlang a. Heng Category zingah hian – Villages Demonstrating Exemplary Financial Stability Through User Charge Collection Efficiently tih hnuaiah an tui dawn te tangkai taka hmanga, pipe leak lo tura thiehtawp chhuahtu khua – S.Vanlaiphai chu an nominate thu a tarlang.

Hawnna programme hi Er. C.Lallawmzuala, JE PHED, Hnahthial WATSAN Sub-Division chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a ni.

Tui Kut hawnna hun hi Hnahthial District Water & Sanitation Member-ten chhimin Nadi Sankalp (River Pledge) an chham nghal a. Jal Mahotsav hawnna hun hi DSWM meeting-in chhunzawm nghalin tul leh pawimawh zualte sawi ho a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT BAWRHSAP AWARD 2026 CHUNGCHANGAH THUTKHAWM NEI
content:
4742/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 9th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu Donny Lalruatsanga Lawngtlai Bawrhsap kaihruaiin a Office Chamber-ah 'Bawrhsap Award 2026' chungchang sawiho a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan 'Bawrhsap Award' chuan Lawngtlai khawpui faina leh thianghlimna kawngah nasa takin hmasawnna a thlen thu a sawi a. Faina leh thianghlimna kawngah hmasawn zel a tul thu tarlangin, VC, NGO leh khawtlang mipuite thahnem ngai taka thawhpui turin a sawm a ni. Veng fai endik kawngah MJA ten hna an thawk tha hle tih sawiin, endik hna kalpui zel turin a ngen a. Lawngtlai District - in faina leh thianghlimna kawngah hma a sawn zel theih nan rilru put hmang thlak pawh a hun tawh hle a ti a, rilru, taksa leh khawtlang vawngfai turin mi tinte harh thar a tul hle a ni, a ti. Bawrhsap chuan faina kawngah sawrkar kutah engkim dah thei a ni lo tiin Lawngtlai mipuite theihtawp chhuaha thawhpui turin a sawm am Council Veng, New Vengpui leh Electric Veng VCP ten an ngenna angin, an veng chhungah CCTV dah sak an nih tur thu Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a tarlang bawk.

Bawrhsap Award- hi Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga Village Council - 12 inelna tur a ni a, Award- hi kum tinin Republic Day ( 26th January) ah hlan thin a ni. He Award dawng tur thlannaa tehfung hrang hrang leh lawmman tur chu a hnuaiah hian tarlan a ni.

Tehfung

1. Veng chhung faina ( Side - drain, Kawngpui, Mimal leh Vangtlang hmunhma te)2. Ran khuahkhirh that dan3. Veng chhung Motor - parking felfai dan

Lawmman

Pakhat na : Rs. 1,00,000 + TrophyPahnih na : Rs. 70,000 + TrophyPathum na : 50,000 + TrophyConsolation Prize : VC (Pakhat tan ) Rs. 20,000

Bawrhsap Award- dawngtu tur endik hna hi Mizoram Journalist Association (MJA) ten an thawk a, an ni hian thlatin endik hna an thawk thin a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian MJA Lawngtlai, President, LDVCA, VCP New Vengpui, VCP Council Veng leh VCP Electric Veng te an tel thei a,  Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah Jal Mahotsav hawng
content:
4741/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 9th March 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference, Champhaiah District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) an thukhawm a, Chairman, Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan kaihruaiin March ni 9 atanga ni 23 chhunga hman tur, Jal Mahotsav campaign a hawng a ni.

He hunah hian PHE Champhai WATSAN Division EE leh Member - Secretary ni bawk Er. Jerome Lalremtluanga chuan DWSM hnathawh hrang hrang - Jal Seva Ankalan kalpui a nih dan te, Jal Arpan Diwas hman a nih tawh thu te, DWSM technical thil chi hrang hranga pui tura District Technical Unit (DTU) din thu te leh hmalakna dang tam tak a tarlang a, SBM-G District Coordinator Pi Julie C. Mawii chuan Khawbunga Plastic Waste Management Centre sak mek chungchang a sawi bawk a ni. DWSM thukhawm chuan he campaign hman dan tur relin sub-division-ah leh khaw hrang hranga hman dan tur te an rel a, March ni 23 hian a kharna hun hman an rel bawk a ni. Member kal khawmte hian Jal Mahotsav puala thutiam, tui humhalh leh humhim tha turin an la ho bawk a ni.

Chairman Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan DWSM leh PHE department hnathawh te chu tha a tih hle thu sawiin Champhai chu tuihna kan humhalh thain tui kan hmang thiam tih a sawi a, he Jal Mahotsav pawh hi tha taka hmang turin theihtawp chhuah turin member te a chah a, tui hi mitin tana thil pawimawh tak a nih vangin tumah dawng tha lo emaw nei lo an awm loh nan hma lak zel a tul thu a sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-a MFA Inter-District Junior Boys Championship 2025 -2026 neih tur changchangah thukhawm
content:
4740/2025-2026

Dated: Mamit the 9th of March, 2026:Vawiin khan Mamit-a MFA Inter-District Junior Boys Championship 2025 -2026 18th March,2026 - 27th March,2026 a neih tur changchangah DC Conference Hall,Mamit-ah Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte,Addl DC kaihruainaa thutkhawm a ni a, inbuatsaihna kal mek leh kal dan tur rel ho a ni.

Pi Carolyn chuan district huapa inelna pawimawh tak Mamit in a thleng tur chu lawmawm tiin district hmasawna a ti lang a ni a ti a, MDFA bakah Sawrkar department leh mipuite pawhin theih anga mikhual te lo thleng a, Mizo ze mawi hawihhawmna nen zo taka lo district dang atanga lo kal te mikhual turin a ngen.

Thutkhawmah hian Pu Lalropuia, Secy,Mamit District Football Association(MDFA) chuan report pein mamawh leh inbuatsaihnaa thil tul tê a thlen a, member ten hmalakna ngaite an sawi.

MFA District Junior Championship hi 18th March,2026 atang 27th March,2026 thleng GSA Playground-ah neih tur niin district tin atangin team 1 theuh an tel anga, kum 15 hnuai lam tan a tel theih ang.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN DISTRICT SPORTS COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
4739/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 9th March 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Sports Committee chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihruaiin a Office Chamber-ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan infiamna hrang hrang hruaitu lo kalte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Infiamna kawng hrang hrangah hmasawn tura theihtawp chhuah a tul thu tarlangin, Member- te theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a. Sum leh pai (Promotional Fund) awm ang angte rualkhai taka hman thiam a pawimawh hle tih sawiin, Sports discipline hrang hrang tihhmasawn nan hman a nih tur thu a sawi a ni. Bawrhsap chuan sawrkar kum tharah project mumal tak neia hmalak a pawimawh thu tarlangin, hemi kawnga ngaihtuahna seng turin kalkhawmte a chah nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh hrang hrang sawiho a ni a. Promotional Fund - chu tha leh felfai taka hman ni se tih niin, Utilization Certificate - siam thin ni se an ti a. Sports Association- in hmalakna an neih ang angte thlalak leh video - te lakkhawm thin ni se, an ti a ni. Lawngtlai District - in infiamna lama rahbi thar a kai theih nan thawhhona tha zawk awm zel se an ti bawk a ni.

Sports Association- hrang hrang ten sum leh pai an mamawh dan tarlanna neiin, hnuaia mi ang hian pek an ni.

1. Lawngtlai District Football Association- ( Rs. 40,000)2. Lawngtlai District Arm Wrestling Association- (Rs.30,000)3. Lawngtlai District Basketball Association- (Rs. 20,000)4. Lawngtlai District Taekwondo Association- (Rs. 30,000)5. Lawngtlai District Badminton Association- (Rs.20,000)6. Lawngtlai District Racing Association-(Rs. 20,000)7. Lawngtlai District Chess Association - (Rs. 20,000)

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai Distrcit Sports Committee Member - te an telkim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: Serchhipah International Women’s Day hmang
content:
4738/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 9th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall ah International Women’s Day chu District Hub For Empowerment of Women, DPO office, Women & Child Development Serchhip huaihawtin neih a ni a. DC Pu Paul L Khuma chu khuallian niin Mizoram State Commission for Women Chairperson Pi C. Zodinpuii chu khual zahawm a ni.

DC chuan tun hmain India ramah hmeichhiate dinhmun a hniam thin hle a; Hindu dan tha lo tak hmeichhe pasal sun te hal hlum Sati te, hmeichhe thuam chhawm dowry system te leh society in a ken tel hmeichhe dinhmun tha lo tam tak avangin hmeichhe fa tihhlum female infanticide te pawh a hluar hle thin, a ti a. Sawrkar chuan hmeichhiate dinhmun chawikang turin nasa takin tan a la a, tunah chuan Mizoramah ngei pawh rorel khawl sang berah thuin, Minister leh MLA te kan nei ta a ni, a ti. Khawtlang leh chhungkuaa hmeichhe dinhmun pawimawhzia sawiin Pu Paul L Khuma chuan hmeichhiate tel lovin khawvel a kal thei lo a; mipate tifamkimtu, tichaktu leh timawitu an ni, a ti a. Kan ram siamtha turin chhungkuaah bul kan tan a ngai a, chu chhungkua khalh ngil tur chuan kan inchhungkhura nu ber te an pawimawh a ni, tih sawiin DC chuan International Women’s Day ah hian hmeichhiate pawimawhzia leh hlutzia hre thar turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

He hunah hian Khual zahawm Pi C. Zodinpuii, Chairperson, Mizoram State Commission for Women chuan International Women’s Day puala hun hmanga tura kalkhawmte chibai bukin, India Danpui leh Hmeichhia te humhalhna Dan hrang hrang awm mah se heng te hi la hre lo tam tak leh la zawm lo te an awm thin thu leh hmeichhia te chu chhungkua-ah eizawngtu ber leh hna thawktu ber an ni chung pawha hleilenna tuar an la awm fo thu a sawi a. Hmeichhia te zingah Inchhungkhur-a hleilenna tawk te leh harsatna dang dang tawh te tan sawrkar chuan kawng hrang hranga ruahmanna a siam thu leh a thlawna biakrawn theih tur thlenga a ruahman thu te pawh a sawi bawk.

Serchhip-a International Women’s Day puala hun hman ah hian Serchhip District a Hmeichhe chhuanawm pahnih- Noth East-a Paediatric Critical Care Super specialist hmasa ber Dr. F. Remthangpuii, E. Lungdar leh Dairei Banana Chips-a Manager & Co-Founder, Laltlandiki Fanai, Khumtung te chawimawina hlan an ni a. Anganwadi Workers te tana ‘Teaching Learning Material’ insiam siakna buatsaiha titha te hnenah lawmman hlan ni bawkin Annette Vanlalhmangaihzuali, New Serchhip Anganwadi Centre – I chuan lawmman pakhatna dawngin Esther Lalhmangaihzuali, New Serchhip Sihphir Anganwadi Centre chuan lawmman pahnihna leh Lalhlimpuii, Thentlang-II Anganwadi Centre ten lawmman pathumna an dawng a ni.

Vawiin programme hi District Programme Officer Pi Lalthlamuani’n a kaihruai a. District Mission Coordinator Pu Lalvensanga’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: UD&PA-IN ‘SIKUL BUNGRAW INTHLENG RUNPUI’ A BUATSAIH
content:
4737/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 9th March, 2026:Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Department buatsaih ‘Sikul Bungraw Inthleng Runpui – Swap and Save Campaign’ chu vawiin khan Sanitation Site Office, Tuikualah Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau, Commissioner and Secretary, UD&PA chuan khuallian niin Aizawl leh District hrang hranga hlawk taka mi hrang hrangin an hman theih nan a hawng.

Khuallian Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau chuan Swap and Save Campaign buatsaih a ni chu tha a tih thu sawiin, a ngaihtuahchhuaktute chungah leh a hlawhtlin nana Department mite thawhhonaah lawmthu a sawi a. UD&PA Department hnathawh hrang hrang karah Swap and Save chu Urban Development leh Poverty Alleviation intawhna tak niin, faina lama hmasawnna pakhat, mi rethei zawkte’n an chhawr theih tur niin a sawi a. Mipuite’n awlsam taka thil tha kan tih theih tur Department-in a chhawp chhuak chu a lawmawm hle niin a sawi.

UD&PA Commissioner & Secretary chuan nikuma a vawi khatna atana Swap and Save Campaign an kalpui chu a hlawhtling hle tih sawiin, kuminah pawh a thehlar lama tan lakpui turin media lam leh Department mite a sawm a. Nikuma bungraw lut zat let vel target-a neih a, District lam nen pawh thawhhona tha zawk neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a. A mamawhtute’n bungrua an lam theihna tur, hmun hrang hranga 3R Centre-te leh a buaipui tur self-help group-te UD&PA hnuaia an lo awm sa chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, department hmalakna tikimtu leh tichaktu an ni thei dawn a ni, a ti.

Hawnna hun hi Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, Director, UD&PA Department-in kaihruaiin, Pi C. Lalduhzuali, Joint Director (Admin), UD&PA Department chuan technical report a pe a ni.

Nikum khan Swap and Save Campaign hi Aizawl veng pasarih (7) leh District headquarters tinah neih niin, mipuiin an hlut hle a. Nikuma campaign neih chhunga bungraw lut zawng zawng chu 20,386 niin, chhuak zat 12,596 a ni.

March ni 9 – 21, 2026 chhungin he campaign hi kalpui a ni ang a. Centre hi Aizawl khawpuia veng pariat (8)-ah leh district headquarters tinah hawn a ni. He Centre hi zirlai naupang session thar kai mai turte’n an zirlaibu hman tawh loh, uniform hak tawh loh te leh zirlai kaihhnawih (school items) an rawn donate theih nan leh, a la hmang tangkai turte’n an hman nawn ve leh theih nana awlsam zawk leh a thlawna an lak theihna tur hmun a ni.

3R Centre awmna hmun te:-Govt. Multiutility Centre, ThakthingAMC Plaza, BawngkawnSanitation Site Office, Near Solomon’s Cave, TuikualDawrpui Middle School, DawrpuiLocal Council House, VaivakawnLocal Council House, Durtlang NorthLocal Council House, ITICommunity Hall, Armed Veng South

Sikul Bungraw Inthleng Runpui hi mipuite’n an hlut hle a, sikul bungraw hluihlawn tawh, bawlhhlawh chang mai turin a hmang tangkai turte hnen a thlen theihna tur kawng tha tak niin, bawlhhlawh tihtlem kawngah pawh hmasawnna tha tak a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitual District Monitoring Committee for Bana Kaih Scheme thu khawm
content:
4736/2025-2026

Saitual, the 9th March, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah Saitual District Monitoring Committee for Bana Kaih Scheme chu an chairperson, District Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin an thu khawm.

He hunah hian Pu Tharun Patnaik, SDO (S), Member Secy, District Monitoring Committee chuan DMC hmachhawp te a tarlang a, March ni 11, 2026 (Thawhtanni) hian District Level Briefing cum Distribution of CM Special package Grant Phase-II neih a ni ang. He programme-ah hian progress partner te chu anmahni department theuhah technical training pek an ni ang a, chumi zawhah orientation training chu DC Conference Hall-ah neihpui leh an ni ang. He hunah hian certificate leh placard/ signboard chu progress partner te hnenah sem chhuah a ni ang a, Banakaih Scheme Phase-I a hlawhtlinna lo chang tawhte video thlir ho a ni bawk ang. March ni 17, 2026-ah hian District Level Workshop on Handholding Scheme neih tura rua hman a ni bawk.

Tun dinhmunah hian CM Special Package Phase-II atan AH & Vety leh Horticulture department hnuaiah Progress Partner pahnih thlan chhuah an ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi Pu Srinivas Sadi, DC & Chairperson, DMC for Bana Kaih Scheme, Pu Lallawmawma, Addl. DC, Pu Tharun Patnaik, SDO (S) & Member Secy, DMC for Bana Kaih Scheme leh DMC for Bana Kaih Scheme member te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada hawn a ni
content:
4735/2025-2026

Khawzawl dated 9th March 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11 khan DC Conference Hall, Khawzawlah DWSM (District Water and Sanitation Mission) bultumin Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada (Kar hnih chhung awh Tui Kût) hawn a ni a, Khawzawl Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Pu K. Zorammuana’n hawngin, Er. Liantluanga Chohte, Executive Engineer, PHED in a kaihruai.

Er. Freddy Vanlalmuanawma Sub-Divisional Officer, PHED atangin report ngaihthlak niin, Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada (Kar hnih chhung awh tui kût) hi Tui hna humhalh a enkawl dan in hrilh tharna leh mipui te'n kan tui tlante kan ta ani tih hriatna tur atana campaign neihna tur a ni a. Campaign hi March ni 9 atanga ni 23 chhung awh tur niin, ni 23 ah kharna hun neih leh tur a ni. Hemi chhung hian activities hrang hrang neih tura ruahman a ni a, tuizem, filter etc. tifaina hnatlang neih te leh Tui thianghlim leh thianghlimloh endikna neih a ni dawn bawk a, Khawzawl District chhung khaw hrang hrangah campaign neih tum a ni. President of India in March ni 23, 2026 hian World Water Day pualin tui enkawlna kawnga hma la tha te hnenah chawimawina hun a nei dawn a, Aizawla neih tur niin, Khawzawl District atang pawhin dawn a ni ang.

Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Pu K. Zorammuana chuan zirlaite leh naupangte hnenah kan tuihna neih te enkawl dan a thara in zirtir a tul hle thu a sawi a. Khawzawl District chu mipuite thawhhona zarah tui thianghlim kan la hnianghnar chu lawmawm a tih hle thu a sawi a, hemi chhawm nung zel tur hian thing leh mau kan neih te awmze nei zawka humhalh zel a ngaih thu a sawi. Sorkar leh Department hrang hrang te'n thahnem ngai taka an thawh bakah mipuite pawhin tui humhalhna kawngah tih ve tur kan neih te hriat a tul hle thu sawiin, in tinin tui khawlna tha neih a, sorkar atanga connection kan dawn bakah ruah tui khawl uar hle a tul thu sawiin, hemi tur hian tlawmngai pawl te nen thawhhona tha neih tul thu a sawi a. Vawiina hun hman hian nakin zel atana tangkaina a neih theih ngei a beisei thu sawiin, Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada programme hawnna hun a nei nghal a ni.

He hunah hian DWSM (District Water and Sanitation Mission ) leh DTU (District Technical Unit) memberte bakah, PHE office staff te kim takin an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip Kawnpui VC Hall-ah hleilenna tawk hmeichhia te tan a thlawna thubuai remsak an ni dawn
content:
4734/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 9th March, 2026:Kumin International Women’s Day denchhen hian Kawnpui VC Hall, Serchhipah naktuk March 10, 2026 (Thawhlehni) hian Mahila Jan Sunwai – hleilenna tawk hmeichhia te tan a thlawna thubuai remsak an ni dawn a. He Free Public Hearing hun hi Pi C. Zodinpuii, Chairperson, Mizoram State Commission for Women leh Pu Paul L Khuma, Serchhip DC te bakah mi pawimawh dangten an hmanpui ang.

Hmeichhe dikna chanvo rahbehna hrang hrang tuartute chuan he hunah hian complain a thehluh theih dawn a. Complain thehlut duhte chuan District Programme Officer, WCD; Child Development Project Officer, WCD; DC leh SP te hnen ah ziakin theh luh tur a ni.

Inchhungkhura hleilenna, eng kawng pawha tawk te, nupa kar harsatna avanga hmeichhe chunga tawrhna thleng te, hnathawhna hmuna thawhpui mipate atanga harsatna tawk te, chhaih nawmnah tawkte leh eng kawng pawha hmeichhia nihna avanga hleilenna leh nekchepna tawk tetan harsatna a thlen theih a ni.

Free Legal Public Hearing - Mahila Jan Sunwai neih turah hian complain theh lutte tan he mi ni hian a rang thei ang berin an harsatna te chinfel nghal tum a ni.

Attachment
